final:
module divide_by_8 (
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input [2:0] in,
    output reg [2:0] out
);
    always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
        if (rst) begin
            out <= 3'b000;
        end else begin
            out <= in >> 3; // Divide by 8 using right shift
        end
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
